title: Replace Enum.reduce with Enum.map_reduce for paired output
prompt: Refactor this: `def with_running_total(list) do {result, _} = Enum.reduce(list, {[], 0}, fn x, {acc, total} -> {acc ++ [{x, total + x}], total + x} end); result end`. Rewrite to use `Enum.map_reduce/3` — a single call that produces the transformed list and the accumulator without the `++` append. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.RunningTotal do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Requires knowing Enum.map_reduce — a less-common Enum function. Sonnet typically keeps the plain reduce form.
